name: O.G.R.R. Wolf Spider
description: The O.G.R.R. Wolf Spider takes one of the scariest threats in the park and pushes it even further, layering venom, burst, and ambush pressure into something much harder to control.
behavior: Its night spawn only unlocks after releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab. After that it appears at night in the northern blueberry shrubs near the metal bench and turns almost any mistake into an expensive chase.
interactionWithPlayer: It is one of those variants that demands total discipline. Lose the rhythm against it and you end up donating venom, burst, and space at exactly the worst possible time.
interactionWithCreatures: It shares space extremely well with other aggressive variants because, on its own, it already demands more attention and stamina than normal. Its mere presence makes any wave feel more tense.
strategy: Fresh is still key, but the element alone will not win this fight for you. What really decides it is reading timings, refusing to panic, and never handing over full combos once the venom starts squeezing the pace.
environments: After releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab
Northern Blueberry Shrubs near the Metal Bench

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick basic attack at close range.

abilities.name: Combo Bite
abilities.description: A short bite chain used to keep pressure up.

abilities.name: Charged Lunge
abilities.description: A long frontal attack meant to catch retreats.

abilities.name: Jump Attack
abilities.description: Leaps at the target to force repositioning.

abilities.name: Counter Attack
abilities.description: It answers quickly after a brief opening in your pressure.

infusions.name: Fresh
specialTraits: All direct hits also apply 20 Chill buildup.
infusions.recommendations: Do not stay on fresh damage as your main answer.
combatTips: Swap to spicy damage or a reliable physical weapon if your build depends on fresh.

infusions.name: Sour
specialTraits: All direct hits also apply 20 Tang buildup.
infusions.recommendations: Avoid staying on sour weapons as your main answer.
combatTips: Spicy is the cleanest elemental answer; otherwise use a physical weapon that does not depend on Tang.

infusions.name: Spicy
specialTraits: All direct hits also apply 20 Sizzle buildup.
infusions.recommendations: Do not depend on spicy damage while this infusion is active.
combatTips: Fresh is the cleanest elemental answer if the creature lets you hold the tempo.

lesserMutationsDescription: Besides the main infusion, it can also spawn with a random lesser mutation. That roll is independent from the active flavor and stays separate from the selector.
lesserMutations: Attack Up: increases attack damage by 33%.
The Quickness: increases movement speed by 200%.
Damage Resist: reduces all incoming damage by 25%.
Life Steal: heals for 150% of the damage it deals.
Blastwave: on hit, it has a 33% chance to trigger an unblockable extra blast for 50 explosive damage and a long stun.
Shockwave: on hit, it has a 75% chance to fire an extra wave for 50 shock damage. Weapons do not block it, but shields do.
Summon Ally: on hit, it has a 75% chance to summon a faction ally: Spiderling (25 HP) if it is a spider, Northern Scorpling (200 HP) if it is a scorpion, or Mini Larva (75 HP) otherwise.
inflicts: All of its attacks apply venom, and the heavier moves punish missed blocks with extremely dangerous buildup.
specialTraits: Bite, 5-Combo Bite, Charged Lunge, and Jump Attack still add 20 Venom on hit. The active infusion adds its own buildup on top of that impact.
Its combat affinities depend on the active infusion. Select the flavor to review the current immunities, weaknesses, and applied effects.
